content:
# Sixth Street 2025 Summer Internship - Engineering Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Sixth Street 2025 Summer Internship - Engineering internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** NYC
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Sixth Street
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Sixth Street is offering a 2025 Summer Internship - Engineering internship position in NYC. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Sixth Street's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Sixth Street interview and increase your chances of success.
